text.content:
★ Presence

Level 1: Awe

Cost: Free | Pool: Man + Presence | Type: Utility

Radiate an aura of magnetic charisma. Everyone within earshot finds you fascinating, attractive, and worth listening to. They will turn to face you, stop conversations, and give you their full attention. In social situations, add your Presence rating as bonus dice to all Charisma and Manipulation rolls. Does not compel obedience — people listen eagerly but can still disagree. Lasts one scene. Vampires resist by adding Composure to their opposing pools.

Level 1: Daunt

Cost: Free | Pool: Cha + Presence | Type: Utility

Project an aura of menace and dominance. Everyone nearby feels uncomfortable, intimidated, and reluctant to challenge you. Add your Presence rating as bonus dice to Intimidation rolls. Mortals with Resolve 2 or lower will not voluntarily approach you or make eye contact. In combat, targets must spend 1 Willpower to attack you for the first time each scene. Does not affect vampires of lower generation. Lasts one scene.

Level 2: Lingering Kiss

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive. Your Kiss (vampire bite) produces intense, addictive euphoria far beyond the norm. Mortals you feed from become emotionally obsessed with you and the experience. They gain the Infatuated condition toward you for (your Presence rating) weeks after a single feeding. Repeated feedings deepen the addiction. The mortal will seek you out, defend you, and may neglect their own life. This is not a Blood Bond — it is psychological addiction.

Level 3: Dread Gaze

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Cha + Presence vs Composure + Resolve | Type: Combat

Lock eyes with a target and project overwhelming supernatural terror. The target must roll Composure + Resolve (Difficulty = your successes) or be affected: failure by 1-2 = frozen in place for 1 turn; failure by 3+ = flee in panic for the rest of the scene; critical failure = collapse in gibbering terror. Vampires who fail must check for Rotschreck. Only affects one target at a time. The target remembers the fear vividly. Range: line of sight.

Level 3: Entrancement

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Cha + Presence vs Composure + Wits | Type: Combat

Target a single person within conversational range. On success, they become utterly devoted to you for (successes) nights. They will do nearly anything you ask — fetch, carry, spy, lie, betray friends — as long as it doesn't directly threaten their life. They view you as the most important person in their world. Self-destructive or suicidal commands break the effect. This is not mind control — the target is willing and believes in their devotion. Contested by the target's Composure + Wits.

Level 4: Irresistible Voice

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive enhancement. Your Presence powers now work through any medium that carries your voice — phone calls, radio, podcasts, live video. The target must hear your actual voice (recordings work but are less effective: -2 dice). This dramatically extends the range and applicability of Awe, Daunt, Dread Gaze, and Entrancement. Does not work through text.

Level 4: Summon

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Presence vs Composure + Int | Type: Combat

Call a person you have previously met to come to your current location. The target feels an overwhelming compulsion to travel to you by the fastest means available. They may not know why — they just feel a desperate need to be at your location. The target travels for up to one night; if they haven't arrived by dawn, the compulsion fades. The target knows your current location intuitively. Range: same city (approximately). Vampires of lower generation can resist with Composure + Int.

Level 5: Majesty

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: Cha + Presence | Type: Combat

Radiate an aura of absolute authority and power. No one in your presence can take hostile action against you — they physically cannot raise a hand, draw a weapon, or speak against you. Mortals drop to their knees. Vampires freeze. To break through Majesty and attack, a vampire must spend a Willpower point and succeed on a Resolve + Composure roll (Difficulty = your Presence + 2). Even on success, they suffer a 3-dice penalty to attack you. Lasts one scene or until you attack someone (which breaks the aura).

Level 5: Star Magnetism

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Presence | Type: Utility

Enhance Awe to affect an entire crowd — hundreds of people at once. Everyone in earshot becomes captivated by you. You are the most interesting, beautiful, important person in the room. Crowds part for you, strangers offer gifts and favors, and no one can look away. Useful for public speaking, performances, and creating fanatical followings. The effect fades after the scene, but attendees remember you fondly and will speak of you for weeks. Vampires in the crowd resist individually.
